description:
Offered: annually
Fundamental principles of atmospheric processes are discussed, with emphasis on mid-latitude phenomena. Tropical and severe weather are also explored. Weather forecasting techniques using real-time data are introduced.
Prerequisite(s): Successful completion of the Quantitative Reasoning Requirement. GEOG 1000 is recommended.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL, SI
prerequisites: Successful completion of the Quantitative Reasoning Requirement. GEOG 1000 is recommended.
